% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11383.
\tzpentry{ID11383}{Closed Curvature Parameter Sign}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For a closed hypersphere with positive spatial curvature k=+1, the cosmological curvature parameter is negative.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\Omega_{K}=-\frac{k c^{2}}{a_{0}^{2}H_{0}^{2}},\qquad k=+1\Rightarrow \Omega_{K}<0
